overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through suburban Los Santos during golden hour. The character crosses streets with moderate traffic including trucks and sedans, passes commercial buildings and residential houses, and follows the concrete Los Santos River channel toward the downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban commercial street with gas station

events.description: character steps onto asphalt road and begins crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk then crossing the street at the intersection

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree trunk with thick branches extending over the sidewalk
wooden telephone pole with multiple cross-arms and wires
low-rise suburban commercial structures including a gas station with visible signage
colorful rectangular gas station price signs visible above the buildings
single-story suburban homes with pitched roofs behind front yards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a suburban sidewalk beside a massive olive tree and bushes. The character walks past utility poles toward a commercial intersection with gas station signs visible in the distance. The ground transitions from concrete sidewalk to asphalt crosswalk as the character crosses the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: white sedan passes by from left to right
large BIG G GOODS semi-truck passes through the intersection
green garbage truck with recycling logo passes by closely

agents.ego_description: standing near the roadside observing the flow of traffic including trucks and sedans passing by

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with 'BIG G GOODS' trailer driving through the intersection
green garbage truck with 'Recycling in Your Street Since 1978' text passing by

entered.detail: large semi-truck with white trailer displaying red 'BIG G GOODS' logo
green sanitation truck with recycling symbol and text on the side
tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines extending across the scene
tall downtown skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance against the golden sky
tall palm trees lining the street against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands near a busy arterial road during golden hour, observing moderate traffic. A white sedan passes first, followed by a large BIG G GOODS semi-truck and a green garbage truck. Power transmission towers and the distant downtown skyline become visible against the warm sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential driveway transitioning to commercial strip

events.description: character turns right onto a residential driveway and sidewalk
approaching the HEARTY TACO commercial building with large signage

agents.ego_description: turning onto a residential driveway and continuing along the sidewalk past houses toward a commercial area

notable_agents.action: blue sedan with tan roof driving along the street

entered.detail: blue four-door sedan with distinctive tan colored roof
dark colored sport utility vehicle driving on the road
single-story house with stone facade and attached garage with driveway
large red and yellow commercial sign for 'HEARTY TACO' restaurant
large empty billboard structure visible behind the commercial buildings
green and white real estate sign reading 'DYNASTY 8 FOR SALE' in front of a property

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a residential driveway, passing a house with stone veneer. A blue sedan and dark SUV drive past on the street. The character continues toward a commercial strip featuring a prominent 'HEARTY TACO' sign and billboards, with a real estate for-sale sign visible on the lawn.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel walkway with downtown views

events.description: path opens up to reveal the concrete Los Santos River channel and downtown skyline
character continues walking along the curved path following the river channel

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway beside the concrete drainage channel, observing the downtown skyline in the distance

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking along the path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large concrete flood control channel with sloped sides and minimal water, characteristic of the Los Santos River
concrete bridge spanning across the drainage channel
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the iconic Los Santos River concrete channel, with the path running alongside the sloped concrete walls. The downtown skyline is prominently visible in the golden hour light, backlit by the setting sun. The character walks along the elevated pathway with metal railings, passing under power transmission towers and approaching a bridge that crosses the channel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from a quiet suburban sidewalk toward a bustling arterial road under the glow of a golden hour sunset. It begins beside a massive olive tree and dense bushes, gliding past utility poles toward a commercial intersection where gas station signs appear in the distance. As the character moves forward, the ground transitions from a concrete sidewalk to an asphalt crosswalk to cross the street. The scene then opens up to a busy roadway where a white sedan, a large BIG G GOODS semi-truck, and a green garbage truck pass by in moderate traffic. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering power transmission towers and the distant downtown skyline silhouetted against the warm evening light.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a quiet suburban neighborhood into the industrial expanse of the Los Santos River channel. It begins by turning onto a residential driveway past a stone-veneer house as a blue sedan and dark SUV pass by on the street. The camera then moves toward a commercial strip, passing a real estate sign and a prominent Hearty Taco billboard. As the suburban surroundings fade, the scene shifts to the concrete river channel, where the character walks along an elevated pathway with metal railings. The journey finally leads under massive power transmission towers toward a bridge, with the downtown skyline glowing in the backlit golden hour light.
